productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Printed White Tops
description: Composition White round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fitting Regular  Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron; do not iron directly on print This T-shirt from united colors of benetton pays tribute to the modern woman with its irreverant abstract print. Turning conventional style on its head, this tee is a must-have. Pair it with distressed jeans and bright slippers to tap into the label's funky aesthetic.  Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5'8' and chest 33"
